questions.text: What is the capital of France?

feedback.cita_literal: Paris is the capital and most populous city of France, with an estimated population of 2,165,423 residents in 2019.
feedback.explicacion_fallo: London is the capital of the UK, Berlin is the capital of Germany, and Madrid is the capital of Spain. Paris has been the capital of France since 987 CE.

questions.text: If all roses are flowers and some flowers fade quickly, then which statement must be true?

feedback.cita_literal: In syllogistic logic, if A is a subset of B, and some B have property C, we cannot conclude that A has property C without additional premises.
feedback.explicacion_fallo: This is a classic logical reasoning question. Just because some flowers fade quickly doesn't mean roses specifically do. We cannot deduce anything specific about roses fading from the given premises.

answers.text: Nothing can be determined about roses fading
